channel.title: Home on Tri-Parish Catholic Community
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Tri-Parish Catholic Community

item.title: Becoming Catholic
item.description:
Interested in becoming Catholic or learning more about the Catholic faith?

We would be honored to walk with you. The parish office can help connect you with the right next step, including OCIA, adult faith formation, or a conversation with Father D.

Contact the Parish Office

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Need help from the parish office? Contact details will be confirmed before launch.

Parish Office

  • Phone: To be confirmed
  • Email: To be confirmed
  • Office Hours: To be confirmed

Emergency Sacramental Needs

Emergency sacramental contact guidance must be approved by Father D. before it is posted.

item.title: Faith Formation
item.description:
Faith Formation helps children, teens, adults, and families grow in the Catholic faith.

Religious Education

Registration details, class schedules, sacramental preparation information, and parent resources will be added after parish office approval.

OCIA

OCIA is for adults who want to become Catholic, complete their sacraments, or learn more about the faith.

item.title: Mother of Sorrows
item.description:
Mother of Sorrows parish details will go here.

Location

Address to be confirmed.

Mass Times

Mass times to be confirmed.

About Mother of Sorrows

Parish history, patronage, local ministries, and local events can be added here.

item.title: New Here?
item.description:
Welcome. We are glad you are here.

Whether you are visiting for Mass, returning to the Church, new to the area, or interested in becoming Catholic, this page will help you take the next step.

Start Here

  • Find Mass and Confession times
  • Choose the parish location closest to you
  • Contact the parish office
  • Ask about becoming Catholic
  • Register your family with the parish

item.title: Online Giving
item.description:
Thank you for supporting the mission and daily life of our parishes.

Online giving details will be added after Father D. and the parish office confirm the correct giving link, parish funds, and approved wording.

Give Online

item.title: Our Lady of Perpetual Help
item.description:
Our Lady of Perpetual Help parish details will go here.

Location

Address to be confirmed.

Mass Times

Mass times to be confirmed.

About Our Lady of Perpetual Help

Parish history, patronage, local ministries, and local events can be added here.

item.title: Our Parishes
item.description:
Our tri-parish Catholic community includes St. Ann, Our Lady of Perpetual Help, and Mother of Sorrows.

Each parish has its own history, patron, location, and local community life. Together, we share one Catholic mission.

item.title: Parish Life
item.description:
Parish life is where faith becomes visible through prayer, service, formation, fellowship, and care for one another.

Ministries

Ministry details will be added after the parish office confirms current groups, leaders, and meeting times.

Meal Support Ministry

Our Meal Support Ministry helps coordinate meals and practical care for parish families during illness, grief, childbirth, recovery, or other heavy seasons.

Learn More About Meal Support
